purpose: Prepare compliant and high-scoring DMS bid proposals based on client Terms of Reference, RFQs, RFPs, bid specifications and previous proposal examples.
scoring_optimisation_rules: Extract all evaluation criteria from the TOR.
Identify mandatory requirements before writing the proposal.
Map every client requirement to a DMS capability.
Highlight experience where points are allocated for track record.
Provide detailed implementation plans where points are allocated for methodology.
Use public-sector compliance language where applicable.
quality_rules: The proposal must be specific to the client and bid number.
Do not provide a generic response where the TOR has specific requirements.
Use tables for compliance matrices and scoring responses.
Keep terminology consistent across all sections.
